<!--
Thanks for contributing to FoxForge GG! Keep this short — describe the change so the
diff is legible, don't restate it. The PR title should be a conventional-commit line
(feat/fix/chore/docs/refactor/test), so there's no "type of change" box to tick here.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? One or two sentences of motivation, then the gist. -->

## Screenshots / recording

<!--
Required for any user-facing change. Drop before/after images or a short screen
recording (this is a mobile-first app — a phone-width capture is ideal).
Write "N/A" for engine, data, or tooling-only changes.
-->

## How I tested

<!--
Beyond `npm run verify`: what did you exercise by hand? Name the Pokémon / loadout /
scenario where it matters. If you touched game data, say what you regenerated.
-->

## Linked issue

<!-- Optional. If an issue applies, reference it so it auto-closes on merge. -->

Closes #

## Checklist

<!-- The full gate lives in CONTRIBUTING.md — confirm here, don't re-list it. -->

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally.
- [ ] I worked through the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md#checklist) checklist before opening this PR.
